hook.text: UNITED IN ACTIVE TALKS FOR LEWIS HALL

beats.text: ROMANO: CONTACTS KEPT ALIVE IN LAST 2-3 DAYS
HALL IS KEEN AND UNHAPPY AT NEWCASTLE
NEWCASTLE DEMAND A BIG FEE TO LET HIM GO
WINDOW OPENS TOMORROW — HALL IS A PRIORITY TARGET

caption: Fabrizio Romano reports United have kept contacts active with Lewis Hall's camp in the last 2-3 days 🔴 The Newcastle left-back is keen and reportedly unhappy at the club — but the Magpies will demand a big fee. Window opens tomorrow. Hall is a priority. Is he the left-back we need? Let us know below. Per Fabrizio Romano. REPORTED — per Fabrizio Romano.
